name: jenkins
description: Generated TGG ruleset: jenkins CST <-> Hub-IR. Bidirectional — the engine derives CST->IR and IR->CST from this one set (model a).

rules.documentation: jenkins: user `# foo` comment under agent <-> hub:comment lexical node
